name: No Hold Buttons
description: Switches out a bunch of long-press button prompts with with normal press

options.name: Generic
options.tooltip: Controls a whole bunch of interactions in the game, too many to list. This will change most long press holds to single press interactions.

options.name: Doors
options.tooltip: Switches long-press door interaction to the Open Door button for instant use

options.name: Card Reader
options.tooltip: Makes card reader instant press by switching it to the Open Door button

options.name: Poison
options.tooltip: Switches poison action to use the Open Door key for instant press interaction

options.name: Item Dump
options.tooltip: Containers where you can conceal items, like trash bins

options.name: Talk
options.tooltip: Talk to NPC interaction

options.name: Cannon
options.tooltip: Loading the cannon

options.name: Freelancer
options.tooltip: Misc freelancer stuff. Not needed with Generic enabled. Talk checkbox works for suppliers.

options.name: Vanilla
options.tooltip: No change to open door button

options.name: Agility
options.tooltip: Vault/climb button keyboard or A/X on Xbox/PS

options.name: Reload
options.tooltip: Default R on keyboard or RB/R1 on gamepads

options.name: Fire
options.tooltip: The fire button. Left mouse or Right Trigger. Can interfere with blind-firing

options.name: Sprint
options.tooltip: The sprint button. Left Shift on keyboards or LB/L1 on gamepads. Lets you sprint right through closed doors and auto-close them behind you if you just keep holding the button.

options.name: Vanilla
options.tooltip: No change to conceal/retrieve

options.name: Agility
options.tooltip: Vault/climb button keyboard or A/X on Xbox/PS

options.name: Open Door
options.tooltip: Default E on keyboard or Y/Triangle on gamepads

options.name: Reload
options.tooltip: Default R on keyboard or RB/R1 on gamepads

options.name: Fire
options.tooltip: The fire button. Left mouse or Right Trigger. Can interfere with blind-firing

options.name: Holster
options.tooltip: The draw/holster button. D-pad Up on gamepads.

options.name: Vanilla
options.tooltip: No change to item pickup controls

options.name: Agility
options.tooltip: Vault/climb button keyboard or A/X on Xbox/PS

options.name: Open Door
options.tooltip: Will allow instant press pickup on gamepads instead of long press. Default E on keyboard or Y/Triangle on gamepad

options.name: Reload
options.tooltip: Use reload button to pick up items.

options.name: Holster
options.tooltip: Use holster button to pick up items.

options.name: Switch Shoulder
options.tooltip: Use switch shoulder button to pick up items. Still switches camera shoulder if that's enabled.

options.name: Fire
options.tooltip: The fire button. Left mouse or Right Trigger. Can interfere with blind-firing
